Paginated event stream. Useful for "what happened here in the last hour?"

Flags:
  --since <id>    Return events newer than this cursor (server echoes it back)
  --limit <n>     1..200, default 50
  --kinds <csv>   Filter by public kinds (e.g. doc.updated,comment.added)
  --follow        Long-poll: keep printing new events until Ctrl-C

Usage:
  pura events <slug> [flags]

Examples:
  pura events xy12ab --limit 20
  pura events xy12ab --kinds comment.added,version.restored
  pura events xy12ab --follow

Flags:
  -f, --follow              Poll and stream new events until Ctrl-C
  -h, --help                help for events
      --kinds string        Filter by comma-separated public kinds (e.g. doc.updated,comment.added)
      --limit int           Max rows (1..200, default 50 server-side)
      --poll-interval int   Seconds between polls when --follow is set (default 5)
      --since int           Cursor: return events with id > this value

Global Flags:
      --api-url string   Override API endpoint
      --handle string    User handle (accepts alice or @alice; defaults to _)
      --jq string        Filter JSON output with jq expression
      --json             Force JSON output
      --profile string   Use named profile
      --quiet            Raw data only (no envelope)
      --token string     Override stored token
  -v, --verbose          Verbose output
